title: ChunkTales Season 2
description: A create focused modpack with enhanced performance to decelerate in a fast moving world. Slight elements of exploration and RPG contained!
body:
# ChunkTales: Season 2
This is a modpack created for a SMP server, a project called ChunkTales. For Season 2, we will be powerd by NeoForge! Dive into a world where creativity and technical progress go hand in hand, with the heart of our modpack, the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod.
To incentivise players to use all the cool features of Create, we disabled the Elytra, as well as the nether roof. With these changes, building networks out of train tracks and using trains as a transportation tool becomes one of the fastest way to get from A to B. 

After a lot of tweaking we made sure that the modpack runs well on older hardware aswell, so you can play with all your friends.
